title: Exact Duplicates, Near Duplicates, Change Detection, and Version History · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: A preserved TypeScript crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, Fetch, stream, Cheerio, selector, frontier, Promise, browser, axe, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in multi-signal content identity and change ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Compute and label wire, decoded, DOM, main-content, record, and rendered digests for distinct questions.
Separate URL aliases, byte-identical responses, equivalent admitted records, and replayed observations without deleting provenance.
Use tokenization, boilerplate policy, thresholds, examples, and false-merge review for similarity decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Stage Specific Digests
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 1006 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate stage digests, exact identity, near-duplicate review, change classes, versions, and tombstones; browser TypeScript remains deterministic and free of Node, network, filesystem, browser, and host effects; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Compute and label wire, decoded, DOM, main-content, record, and rendered digests for distinct questions.
